title: Section 19
content: When the Central Government has, under section 18 directed the closure of the metro railway or the discontinuance of the use of any rolling stock-- (a) the metro railway shall not be re-opened for the public carriage of passengers until it has been inspected by the Commissioner and its re-opening is sanctioned in accordance with the provisions of this Chapter; and (b) the rolling stock shall not be used until it has been inspected by the Commissioner and its reuse is sanctioned in accordance with the provisions of this Chapter.
